about.title: About Ledger
about.tagline: A privacy-first portfolio tracker for Korean and US stocks — on one screen.
about.feature1: Live US and Korean stock prices, side by side
about.feature2: Average cost and realized gains computed from your transaction history
about.feature3: Target weights and a rebalancing guide
about.feature4: Earnings calendar and news tailored to your holdings
about.feature5: Everything stays in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
about.whyBody: There was no good tool for investors holding both Korean and US stocks. Brokerage apps are weak on foreign markets, and global trackers don't know Korean tickers. Ledger shows both markets as one portfolio — and keeps your data entirely on your device.
about.dataBody: US prices: Finnhub · Earnings calendar: Alpha Vantage · Korean prices & news: Naver Finance

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.noCollectionBody: None. Ledger collects no personal information — no names, emails, or payment details. There is no sign-up.
privacy.localDataBody: Your holdings, transaction history, and portfolio snapshots are stored only in your browser's localStorage. They never leave your device and are never sent to any server. Clearing browser data deletes them too, so we recommend regular backups (Export).
privacy.apisBody: Ledger uses the Finnhub, Alpha Vantage, and Naver Finance APIs for live prices, earnings, and news. Only the ticker symbols being looked up are transmitted. See each service's privacy policy for details.
privacy.cookiesBody: Ledger uses no cookies. Only your language preference (Korean/English) is saved in localStorage.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy questions, please reach out via GitHub Issues.

help.title: Help
help.gettingStartedBody: Search a company name or ticker in the dashboard's add form — Korean and US stocks are searched together. Picking a result auto-fills the current price; enter quantity and cost, then press '+ Buy'.
help.sellBody: Switch the add form to Sell, choose a holding, enter quantity and sale price, then press '+ Sell'. Realized gains are calculated automatically and shown in the header and transaction history.
help.portfolioBody: Press ✎ on the cash row to enter your cash balance — you can choose KRW or USD. Set a target weight (%) on each holding's ✎, and a rebalancing guide will compare current weights against your targets. Buy/sell amounts are suggestions only.
help.calendarBody: The Calendar page automatically shows upcoming earnings dates for your US holdings. You can also add events like dividend dates manually.
help.backupBody: Use 'Export' at the bottom of the dashboard to save a JSON backup — it includes transactions, snapshots, cash, and target weights. If your browser data is ever cleared, restore it with 'Import'.
help.faq1A: Clearing browser cache or site data can delete it. We recommend regular backups via 'Export'.
help.faq2Q: Are Korean stock prices updated after market close?
help.faq2A: Korean stocks update live only during market hours; after close, the closing price is shown.
help.faq3Q: Can I use Ledger on multiple devices?
help.faq3A: Data is currently stored per device. You can move it with Export/Import; cross-device sync is planned.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.body: The page you requested doesn't exist or has been moved.
